inputs.label: Car Price
inputs.businessContext: The total purchase price of the car before taxes and fees

inputs.label: Down Payment
inputs.businessContext: Amount paid upfront, reducing the loan principal

inputs.label: Annual Interest Rate
inputs.businessContext: Yearly interest rate on the loan

inputs.label: Loan Term (Months)
inputs.businessContext: Duration of the loan in months

inputs.label: Sales Tax Rate
inputs.businessContext: Sales tax applied to the car price

inputs.label: Additional Fees
inputs.businessContext: Extra charges like registration, documentation, etc.

formulas.monthlyPayment: principal * monthlyRate * Math.pow(1 + monthlyRate, loanTermMonths) / (Math.pow(1 + monthlyRate, loanTermMonths) - 1)
